description: A 'Test Evolution' (ID: aabbccdd) appeared in the IES production admin panel submitted Apr 19, 2026. David confirmed this was submitted in error during the session — not a platform artifact. Admin denied it. Root cause: ad-hoc POST to /api/evolutions fired during auth flow debugging.
correction: Do not issue any POST to /api/evolutions outside of rigby-evolution-upload. No test submissions, no debug POSTs, no manual curl calls to the evolutions endpoint.
systemic_fix: All evolution uploads must go through the rigby-evolution-upload skill. No ad-hoc POSTs to /api/evolutions for any reason. If testing auth or payload, inspect the request before firing — do not send to production.
